## Feature Type
Select applicable categories that this feature falls under
- [ ] Gameplay
- [ ] Bots/Training
- [ ] UI/UX
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] Game Uploads
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Other

## Problem
Describe the problem you are facing as a user.

## Proposed Solution
Describe the feature you would like to see.

## Alternatives
Describe any alternatives you have considered.

## Additional Context
Add screenshots, mockups, or examples if possible.
